cfRule.formula: OR(AND(LEFT($A24, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A24)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A24, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A24, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A24)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A24, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A24, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A24)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A24, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A24, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A24)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A24, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A240, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A240)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A240, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A240, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A240)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A240, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A240, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A240)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A240, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A240, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A240)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A240, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A26, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A26)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A26, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A26, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A26)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A26, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A26, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A26)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A26, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A26, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A26)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A26, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A29, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A29)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A29, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A29, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A29)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A29, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A29, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A29)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A29, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A29, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A29)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A29, 12)))))
